# Lutakko.info — Full content for AI / LLM ingestion

> Lutakko.info is the official visitor and partner site for **Lutakon Satama**, the harbour district at the heart of Jyväskylä, Finland. The site is bilingual (Finnish + English) and operated by **Voon IQ** (voon.fi · info@voon.fi).
>
> This file gathers every important fact across the site in a single, AI-friendly Markdown document — suitable for direct ingestion by Claude, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and similar systems.

---

## 1. Place: Lutakon Satama

- **District:** Lutakko, 40100 Jyväskylä, Finland
- **Lake:** Päijänne (the harbour is the northernmost passenger harbour on Lake Päijänne)
- **City:** Jyväskylä, Central Finland
- **Marketing tagline:** *"Suomen elämyksellisin satama"* — "Finland's most experiential harbour" (per Visit Jyväskylä)

### Marina

- **46 guest boat berths** with shore power, water, fuel, sewage and sauna access
- **2017 Guest Harbour of the Year** honourable mention (Finnish Sailing & Boating Association)
- RV parking: 6 spots (3.2 m × 8 m), overnight allowed, no electricity
- Guest mooring at Sataman Kahvila pier: €17 / day, max 4 h without permission

### Landmarks at the harbour

- **Permanent Alvar Aalto-designed boat** on display at the harbour
- **Alvar Aalto Museum** adjacent to the harbour
- **Kuokkalan silta** — landmark bridge arching across the lake
- **Solo Sokos Hotel Paviljonki** + **Paviljonki** convention centre on the block
- **Jyväskylän Rantaraitti** — 13 km accessible lakeside trail begins at the harbour
- **Lutakon uimaranta** (public beach) within walking distance

### Sports & activities

- Beach volleyball courts
- Padel hall (floodlit)
- Outdoor gym + stairs run
- **Gr8 Wake** water-sports centre (wakeboarding, SUP rental, water park)
- Jet-ski rental, flyboard, kayak rental

---

## 2. Events

### OlutSatama — 11–13 June 2026

- **Tagline:** *"Suomen paras olut-tapahtuma"* / "Finland's best beer event"
- **Schedule:** Thu 11 Jun 17:00–23:00 · Fri 12 Jun 15:00–02:00 · Sat 13 Jun 14:00–02:00
- **Location:** Lutakonaukio (Satamakatu 3, 40100 Jyväskylä)
- **Format:** 200+ breweries, food stalls, on-stage programme
- **Audience:** 49 000+ visitors since 2016
- **Tickets:** coregoshop.fi/olutsatama-2026-1
- **Official site:** https://www.olutsatama.fi/
- **Partners (selected):** Aito Elämys, Teerenpeli, Harvestian, JV Media, Maukka, WorkPower
- **Detail page:** https://lutakko.info/venues/olutsatama/

### SuomiPop Festival 2026 — 9–11 July 2026

- One of Finland's biggest Finnish-pop festivals
- Location: Lutakon rantakortteli (waterfront block)
- **Tickets:** https://suomipopfestivaali.fi/jyvaskyla/liput/
- **Official site:** https://suomipopfestivaali.fi/jyvaskyla/
- Lutakko hotels are walking distance: Solo Sokos Paviljonki, Original Sokos Alexandra
- **Detail page:** https://lutakko.info/venues/suomipop/

### Secto Rally Finland 2026 — 30 July – 2 August 2026

- FIA World Rally Championship (WRC) round — one of the most iconic on the calendar
- **Service Park:** Paviljonki, Lutakonaukio (walking distance from the harbour)
- Tens of thousands of international spectators
- **Official site:** https://sectorallyfinland.fi/
- **Detail page:** https://lutakko.info/venues/secto-rally/

### Finlandia Marathon

- Jyväskylä's marathon classic
- Detailed schedule TBD — content coming soon
- **Official site:** https://finlandiamarathon.fi/
- **Detail page:** https://lutakko.info/venues/finlandia-marathon/

---

## 3. Venues — Food, drink, sauna

### Saunaravintola Sataman Viilu

- **Type:** Sauna restaurant; timber pavilion over the lake
- **Location:** Next to the Alvar Aalto Museum
- **Concept:** Archipelago-inspired Nordic menu, 270° lake view, continuous löyly
- **Official site:** https://satamanviilu.fi/
- **Detail page:** https://lutakko.info/venues/viilu/

### M/S Musta Magia (Limanda restaurant)

- **Type:** Restaurant ship; the Limanda restaurant operates on board
- **Capacity:** 200 seats + open terrace deck
- **Phone:** 040 189 0801 · **Email:** info@mustamagia.fi
- **Programme:** Karaoke Fri & Sat (Mikon Karaoke 21:00–00:30), live music Sundays 19:00–21:00
- **May hours:** Mon–Thu 14:00–22:00 · Fri 14:00–01:00 · Sat 12:00–01:00 · Sun 12:00–22:00
- **Tagline:** *"Tervetuloa nauttimaan laivan antimista!"*
- **Official site:** https://mustamagia.fi/
- **Detail page:** https://lutakko.info/venues/musta-magia/

### Konttiravintola Morton

- **Type:** Container restaurant + café with open terrace
- **Address:** Satamakatu 2, 40100 Jyväskylä
- **Tagline:** *"Se alkuperäinen Konttiravintola"* — "the original container restaurant"
- **Season:** Summer only · Wolt delivery available · Group bookings
- **Phone:** 0400 416 372
- **Official site:** https://morton.fi/konttiravintola/jyvaskyla/
- **Detail page:** https://lutakko.info/venues/morton/

### Ravintolalaiva Gaia

- **Type:** Historic inland-steamer restaurant ship
- **Concept:** À la carte dinner cruises onto the open lake and back
- **Detail page:** https://lutakko.info/venues/gaia/

### Jyväskylän Sataman Kahvila (Harbour Café)

- **Type:** Café in a 1919 yellow timber building, right next to the guest dock
- **Operator:** MatkaRhea (also operates M/S Rhea + cruises)
- **Hours:** Daily 10:00–20:00 from 1 April onwards
- **Offer:** Fresh pastries, ice cream, A-licence
- **Phone:** 0400 706 691 · **Email:** myynti@msrhea.fi
- **Tagline:** *"Tervetuloa viihtymään"*
- **Official site:** https://msrhea.fi/jyvaskylan-sataman-kahvila/
- **Detail page:** https://lutakko.info/venues/sataman-kahvila/

### Trattoria Aukio

- **Type:** Italian restaurant on Lutakonaukio
- Detailed content coming soon
- **Detail page:** https://lutakko.info/venues/trattoria-aukio/

### HIISI-panimo (HIISI Brewery)

- **Type:** Local Lutakko microbrewery, taproom + bottleshop
- Detailed content coming soon
- **Official site:** https://hiisi.beer/
- **Detail page:** https://lutakko.info/venues/hiisi/

### Saunalautat (sauna rafts)

- Lutakko hosts multiple sauna-raft operators
- A unified booking hub is in pilot development on Lutakko.info
- **Detail page:** https://lutakko.info/venues/saunalautta/

### Cruise ships at the harbour

- **M/S Rhea, M/S Hilja, Päijänne-Risteilyt Hilden** — Päijänne cruises to Lahti, Jämsä, Suolahti, Laukaa, Viitasaari
- **M/S Löyly, SS Kippari, Saunalautta Eden, M/S Flamia** — sauna boats. M/S Flamia is reportedly the world's first igloo-sauna boat.
- **Siipirataslaiva Vellamo** — paddle-wheel restaurant ship
- **Kavaljeeri II** — additional restaurant ship

### Other restaurants on Lutakonaukio

- **Waves** — container restaurant
- **Satamakahvila** — café at the dock (see Jyväskylän Sataman Kahvila above)
- **Trattoria Aukio** — Italian (own listing)

---

## 4. Culture & nightlife

### Tanssisali Lutakko

- **Type:** Legendary rock club in an early-1900s heritage industrial building beside Lutakonaukio
- **Operator:** Jyväskylän Elävän Musiikin Yhdistys (Jelmu ry)
- **Programme:** Rock, punk, metal and indie shows year-round
- **Official site:** https://www.jelmu.net/
- **History:** https://www.jelmu.net/historia
- **Wikipedia:** https://fi.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tanssisali_Lutakko
- **Detail page:** https://lutakko.info/venues/tanssisali-lutakko/

---

## 5. Operator — Voon IQ

- **Operator of Lutakko.info:** Voon IQ
- **Website:** https://voon.fi
- **Email:** info@voon.fi
- **Founder:** Cenk Yakinlar (Jyväskylä, Finland)
- **Concept:** Voon IQ is a destination-marketing studio. Lutakko.info is the first production deployment of the platform; it can be re-skinned for additional Finnish harbour cities.

### Business model (high level)

- **Listing subscriptions** for venues (Free / Starter €590 / Pro €1 490 / Premium €3 990 per year)
- **Scheduled banner & sponsored-card ads** (hero banner, category card, footer banner, event takeover, newsletter slot) — all managed through the admin dashboard with auto-expiry
- **Booking commissions** on activities and sauna reservations (10–12 % typical)
- **Affiliate income** on cruise tickets, hotel bookings, brewery merchandise
- **Future B2B data product** for partners (Visit Jyväskylä, city tourism office)

---

## 6. Technical layout

- **Live URL:** https://lutakko.info
- **Repository:** https://github.com/cenk2025/lutakko (public)
- **Stack:** Next.js 14 (App Router) + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS + Framer Motion
- **Backend:** Supabase (Postgres + Auth + Row-Level Security)
- **Hosting:** Vercel with static export (`output: 'export'` in production)
- **Search-engine artefacts:**
  - Sitemap: https://lutakko.info/sitemap.xml
  - Robots: https://lutakko.info/robots.txt
  - This file: https://lutakko.info/llms-full.txt
  - Quick LLM index: https://lutakko.info/llms.txt

---

## 7. Contact

- **Sales / partnerships / general enquiries:** info@voon.fi
- **Site operator:** Voon IQ — https://voon.fi
- **District:** Lutakko, 40100 Jyväskylä, Finland

---

*Generated for AI / LLM ingestion. Updated alongside the codebase.*
